issues.description: Trigger should be 'Activated' (optional ability with 'You may'), not 'OnPlay'
Missing condition: Must have less Characters than opponent. Should include condition checking character count comparison
FlipLife action is correct, but KO actions lack proper targeting logic. Both KO actions should be conditional on the character count check and should use 'UpTo' semantics (0 or 1 each)
Second effect (Trigger with DrawCard/TrashFromHand) does not match card text at all. Should be removed entirely
KO target should specify 'UpTo' 1 character (optional), not mandatory selection
KO target should specify 'UpTo' 1 character (optional), not mandatory selection
